features.title: Email/Password Registration & Login
features.description: User registration with email/password. Fields: email (validated), password (min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number). Success: account created, welcome email sent. Failure: duplicate email shows 'account exists' with login link. Edge case: network timeout during registration retries silently.

features.title: Biometric Login (Face ID / Fingerprint)
features.description: Optional biometric authentication for returning users. Enrolment after first successful password login. Face ID (iOS) and fingerprint (Android). Fallback to password if biometric fails 3 times. Edge case: device without biometric hardware shows password-only flow.
